hawkish_phrases: core PCE price inflation was close to 2 percent
inflation for items other than food and energy remained near 2 percent
several participants noted that their views of the appropriate target range for the federal funds rate could shift in either direction
dovish_phrases: a majority of participants expected that the evolution of the economic outlook and risks to the outlook would likely warrant leaving the target range unchanged for the remainder of the year
the Committee will be patient as it determines what future adjustments to the target range for the federal funds rate may be appropriate
growth of economic activity had slowed from its solid rate in the fourth quarter
market-based measures of inflation compensation had remained low
summary: The FOMC unanimously held rates at 2.25-2.50% with a clear dovish bias, stating they would be patient in determining future adjustments given slowing growth, muted inflation pressures, and global uncertainties, with a majority expecting rates to remain unchanged for the remainder of 2019.
